AboutPage.meta_description: Learn why MariNation exists, how music prediction markets work, and who builds the platform.
AboutPage.hero_subtitle: Turn music knowledge into income. Your instincts already know what is next — MariNation finally lets those instincts pay you back.
AboutPage.value_1_body: Most people can spot rising artists early but never benefit from it. MariNation finally lets you turn that instinct into real earnings by predicting the trends you already follow every day.
AboutPage.value_2_body: Turn everyday listening into a rewarding experience by predicting what will rise next. Every stream you catch, every debut you call — it all counts here.
AboutPage.value_3_body: Calling the next breakout star has always been bragging rights with no proof. Here, your predictions are tracked, ranked, and rewarded so you can finally show you were right first.
AboutPage.quote_body: You already know which songs and artists are about to blow up long before the rest of the world, but that insight has never earned you anything until now.
AboutPage.quote_support: MariNation gives you a simple and fast way to make music predictions, track real trends, and earn when you are right — so your instincts finally pay you back.
AboutPage.step_1_body: Explore head-to-head artist battles, chart competitions, and streaming milestones — all updated in real time.
AboutPage.step_2_body: Pick who you think will win. Drake or Kendrick? BTS or BLACKPINK? Your call, your conviction.
AboutPage.step_3_body: Follow live data from Spotify, YouTube Analytics, and Setlist.fm as the market resolves in real time.
AboutPage.step_4_body: Correct predictions pay out. Your rankings are tracked. Your reputation as a tastemaker is finally on record.
AboutPage.team_subtitle: Two people. One mission. An entirely new way to experience music.
AboutPage.team_justin_bio_short: As founder & CEO of MariNationMusic LLC, Justin leads strategy, sales, operations, and marketing — raising seed funding, scaling the platform, and forging key industry partnerships that drive growth.
AboutPage.team_justin_bio_full: As the founder & CEO of MariNationMusic LLC, a pioneering financial services company for music creators, Justin is dedicated to empowering artists with the financial tools and resources they need to thrive. Leading MariNation, he has raised substantial seed funding, scaled the platform to a large user base, and forged key industry partnerships. As director of business development at RSG Group, he achieved a 40% revenue increase and 15% annual sales growth through strategic partnerships and high-impact strategies. His experience as an investment analyst at Moss Adams LP involved managing high-value M&A transactions and conducting in-depth financial due diligence, contributing to a 25% increase in client ROI. Justin is passionate about taking action on innovative ideas and leading motivated teams to success — monetizing passions and living a fulfilled life.
AboutPage.team_justin_achieve_2_text: 25% client ROI growth at Moss Adams LP
AboutPage.team_justin_photo_alt: Justin T. Longo, founder and CEO of MariNation
AboutPage.team_prabhjot_photo_alt: Prabhjot Singh Chadha, CTO and solo developer at MariNation
AboutPage.team_prabhjot_bio_short: As CTO and solo developer, Prabhjot architects and builds the entire MariNation platform — every feature, every screen, every line of code — backed by 10+ years of engineering and a former CTO background.
AboutPage.team_prabhjot_bio_full: With 10+ years of software engineering experience and a background as a CTO, Prabhjot brings deep full-stack expertise to MariNation as both CTO and solo developer. He is solely responsible for architecting, designing, and building the entire platform from the ground up — from the React TSX frontend to backend infrastructure, data pipelines, and real-time market resolution engine. His previous CTO experience gave him the system design instincts needed to build a scalable, production-grade product at speed. Together, Justin and Prabhjot share a vision: that music fans deserve a platform built with the same care and rigor as any top financial product — and Prabhjot ensures every technical decision reflects that standard.
AboutPage.team_prabhjot_achieve_1_text: Sole architect of entire MariNation platform
AboutPage.team_prabhjot_achieve_3_text: End-to-end product engineering, zero to one
AboutPage.mission_body: We believe in working towards dreams, monetizing passions, and living a fulfilled life. MariNation is the tool that makes that possible for every music fan on the planet.
AboutPage.mission_quote_text: Excited to create tools and resources that empower creatives to make a lasting impact. Always open to connecting and exploring new opportunities to drive transformative growth.
AboutPage.cta_banner_subtitle: Join thousands turning music knowledge into real earnings every day. It takes 60 seconds to make your first prediction.

Portfolio.presentation: Welcome to my portfolio page! Here you will find a carefully curated collection of my work and accomplishments. Through this portfolio, I'm to showcase my expertise, creativity, and the value I can bring to your projects.

PortfolioSlug.content: Created a set of promotional materials and branding elements for a corporate event. Crafted a visually unified theme, encompassing a logo, posters, banners, and digital assets. Integrated the client's brand identity while infusing it with a contemporary and innovative approach.
